name: iterm-ghostty-profiles
title: iTerm Profiles for Ghostty
description: Search exported iTerm2 profiles and open them as Ghostty tabs/windows.
author: jack

commands.name: index
commands.title: Ghostty Profiles
commands.description: Search exported profiles and open them in Ghostty.

preferences.name: scriptPath
preferences.title: iterm2_to_ghostty.py
preferences.description: Path to the export script. Used by the *** Sync Profiles *** entry.

commands.name: reorder
commands.title: Reorder Ghostty Profiles
commands.description: Set a custom display order for exported Ghostty profiles.
